hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Autest rule: Claude must never run git push; the user reviews, commits, then pushes manually."}}' || true
